label: Book Order Entry
description: Core order form: mode toggle, category, venue, instrument, side, quantity, and price fields.

0.6.note: — pure order-entry form; all form state is synchronous; submitting/success/error states handled by book-preview-compliance-widget once orderState leaves idle.

0.7.note: — !canExecute warning shown; Preview Order button disabled when fields incomplete; venue list and category tabs always populated from static config.

0.8.note: — error handling for order submission delegated to book-preview-compliance-widget (orderState=error renders errorMessage there).
